title: Operate within a budget framework
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Operate within a budget framework demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Participate in formulation of a budget

pcs.text: Gather budget planning information from relevant sources
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Gather budget planning information from relevant sources?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Gather budget planning information from relevant sources.

pcs.text: Identify priorities in relation to the organisation’s vision and plans
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify priorities in relation to the organisation’s vision and plans?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify priorities in relation to the organisation’s vision and plans.

pcs.text: Identify known sources of income as well as new sources of income
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify known sources of income as well as new sources of income?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify known sources of income as well as new sources of income.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review expenditure for existing operations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review expenditure for existing operations.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review overhead expenditure?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review overhead expenditure.

pcs.text: Estimate expenditure for new initiatives and expansion
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Estimate expenditure for new initiatives and expansion?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Estimate expenditure for new initiatives and expansion.

pcs.text: Request budget variations to suit organisational needs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Request budget variations to suit organisational needs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Request budget variations to suit organisational needs.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Participate in formulation of a budget

elements.title: Supervise financial transaction

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Arrange expenditure within budget delegations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Arrange expenditure within budget delegations.

pcs.text: Record transactions to meet taxation and accounting requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record transactions to meet taxation and accounting requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record transactions to meet taxation and accounting requirements.

pcs.text: Compare actual sales and expenditure to the enterprise budget
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Compare actual sales and expenditure to the enterprise budget?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compare actual sales and expenditure to the enterprise budget.

pcs.text: Check financial reports to ensure operations are within forecast limits
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check financial reports to ensure operations are within forecast limits?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check financial reports to ensure operations are within forecast limits.

pcs.text: Adjust expenditure to meet financial targets as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Adjust expenditure to meet financial targets as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Adjust expenditure to meet financial targets as required.

pcs.text: Report actual and potential variations in budgeted income
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report actual and potential variations in budgeted income?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report actual and potential variations in budgeted income.

pcs.text: Develop recommendations to address budget variations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop recommendations to address budget variations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop recommendations to address budget variations.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Supervise financial transaction

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
